title: SG Compass
description: A simple mod to display the player coordinates and biome when a compass is in it's inventory.
body: A simple mod to display the player coordinates and biome ![Coordinates and biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a039414e8225e0b049bc20b785d7f5d549cdca5_0.webp)when a compass is in it's inventory.![Coordinates displayed on HUD when a compass is in inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f607bd60070376e932115ead5e875d31cca56595_0.webp)
